reviews.comment:
El 27 de Marzo, paramos para cargar combustible y había un olor asqueroso a pis en el exterior. No se podía respirar vaya a donde vaya. Es la primera vez que pasa en años que vamos.

(Translated by Google)
On March 27th, we stopped to refuel and there was a disgusting smell of urine outside. It was unbearable to breathe anywhere. It's the first time this has happened in all the years we've been going here.

reviewReply.comment:
Tiene razón, cuando usted vino nosotros sentimos lo mismo.
Muchas gracias.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvbHU3NU1nEAE

reviews.comment:
Las chicas que atienden son simpáticas y súper serviciales. Me encanta parar allí a tomarme un café.Hace unas semanas paramos a comer unas hamburguesas... Por dios eran un crimen, excelentes, casi reviento pero las comimos todas. Las 5 estrellas son pocas.

(Translated by Google)
The girls who work there are friendly and super helpful. I love stopping there for a coffee. A few weeks ago we stopped for some burgers... Oh my god, they were divine, absolutely delicious, I almost burst but we ate them all. Five stars isn't enough.
